body:
Society Bylaws

Bylaws of the Columbus Orchid Society covering membership, dues, officer elections, and board meeting procedures.

  • Article I — Membership
  • Article II — Officers
  • Article III — Meetings
title: Society Bylaws

body:
Volunteer Role Descriptions

Responsibilities for board officers and show committee volunteers: registration desk, judging clerks, setup crew, and hospitality.

  • Registration lead
  • Judging clerk
  • Setup and teardown
title: Volunteer Role Descriptions

body:
Annual Show Playbook

Step-by-step plan for the annual Columbus orchid show: venue booking, vendor coordination, plant intake, judging schedule, and public hours.

  • Pre-show setup
  • Judging day
  • Public weekend
title: Annual Show Playbook

body:
Board Meeting Notes — January

Notes from the January board meeting: budget review, show date confirmation, and website handoff from the rebuild project.

  • Treasurer report
  • Show planning
  • Website update
title: Board Meeting Notes - January

body:
Registration Desk Checklist

Checklist for the show registration desk: print entry tags, set up the laptop with the new registration page, and brief the volunteers.

  • Print supplies
  • Set up terminals
  • Volunteer briefing
title: Registration Desk Checklist

body:
Newsletter Schedule

Publishing schedule for the quarterly society newsletter: submission deadlines, editor review, and member email send dates.

  • Spring issue
  • Fall issue
title: Newsletter Schedule

body:
Board Meeting Notes — March

Notes from the March board meeting: show budget close-out, volunteer thank-you plan, and next year's venue options.

  • Show wrap-up
  • Volunteer recognition
  • Venue planning
title: Board Meeting Notes - March
